title: Axon to Release Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings on February 24, 2022
text: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Axon (Nasdaq: AXON ), the global leader in connected public safety technologies, today announced that it will report fourth quarter 2021 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, February 24, 2022.

title: Axon Enterprise: A Stunning Growth Story
text: Axon Enterprise sells the Taser product which is a brand monopoly in the market. The company adopted a high-margin SaaS model with predictable recurring income.
